description: The Talon community command set uses a phonetic alphabet for letter input. Update the phonetic alphabet in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\Talon\user\community\core\keys\letter.talon-list by changing the spoken forms for 'a', 'b', and 'c' to their NATO phonetic alphabet equivalents: 'alpha', 'bravo', and 'charlie' respectively.
